version_description: I like my outro better cuz it's easier. Your strum should be down then silence it then down again then silence again.

versions.version_description: From 2024. Link to the song: https://youtu.be/_vWA5S1xDYI.
Includes both tab and chords. Link to this song: https://youtu.be/DLS8W9s-6Co?si=kigvA6svwuG4li0J.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]
I know I might look like[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Another ball cap on a bar stool[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Underneath a PBR light[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Sayin' everything under the moon[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
To get you into my arms tonight[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]
You probably heard it all a thousand times[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
But it ain't what it looks like[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Girl, let me tell you what it looks like[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
  You look like waves on a sunset[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  And you can crash on me all night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
  You look like wine in a truck bed[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]
A little what I'm doin' for the rest of my life 'cause[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
  You look like I'm done lookin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  But girl the hard truth is[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
If this night don't turn into two[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
You look like I'm gonna wind up missin' you[/tab]

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab]                        [ch]D[/ch]
I gotta tell you, baby, I've been[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
The kind of boy your daddy never wanted[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
You to go and fall in love with[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]A[/ch]*
The kinda boys you're probably done with their dumb shit, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
  I bet you heard the stories and[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  Can't say I'm proud of that, but[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
  I've turned the page on the old me[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
  And now I ain't lookin' back 'cause[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
  You look like waves on a sunset[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  And you can crash on me all night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
  And you look like wine in a truck bed[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]
A little what I'm doin' for the rest of my life 'cause[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
  You look like I'm done lookin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  But girl the hard truth is[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
If this night don't turn into two[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                                    [ch]B[/ch]
You look like I'm gonna wind up missin'[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]                          [ch]A[/ch]
Missin' you in the mornin'[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Probably for the next few years[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
When I look back on it[/tab]
I'll still see you right here

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
  You look like waves on a sunset[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  And you can crash on me all night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
  And you look like wine in a truck bed[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]
A little what I'm doin' for the rest of my life 'cause[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
  You look like I'm done lookin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  But girl the hard truth is[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
If this night don't turn into two[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                                       [ch]D[/ch]
You look like I'm gonna wind up missin' you[/tab]
